name: skillswap-timebank
description: SkillSwap Time Bank — a community skill-bartering MERN platform where members trade skills using time-credits, with an AI learning assistant.
author: Namratha R <namrp.18@gmail.com>

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
